file_insights.changes: Created comprehensive Media and MediaFolder Django models with 651 lines including soft delete, multi-tenant isolation, and extensive property methods
key_patterns: TimeStampedMixin and SoftDeleteMixin inheritance
UUID primary keys for global uniqueness
Organization FK for multi-tenant isolation
Self-referential parent FK for hierarchical folders
Property methods for computed attributes (is_image, is_video, dimensions, human_readable_size)
QuerySet methods (get_children, get_media_items, get_descendants)
Soft delete enforcement with deleted_at filtering

file_insights.changes: Created 3 TextChoices enums: MediaType (4 values), MediaStorage (5 values), MediaStatus (4 values)
key_patterns: Django TextChoices for constrained string fields
Comprehensive documentation for each choice value
Support for multiple storage backends (LOCAL, S3, CLOUDINARY, GCS, AZURE)

file_insights.changes: Created 228-line admin configuration with rich UI features for both MediaFolder and Media models
key_patterns: Custom display methods with color-coded badges
HTML formatting for thumbnails and status indicators
Comprehensive fieldsets with collapsible sections
Soft delete filtering in get_queryset
Query optimization with select_related
Admin filters for media_type, status, storage, is_public, organization

file_insights.changes: Created AppConfig with proper configuration and signal import preparation
key_patterns: BigAutoField as default_auto_field
Commented signal import pattern for future expansion
Comprehensive docstring with app responsibilities
Clear documentation of app capabilities
default_app_config for Django app registration
App registration in Django settings

patterns_discovered.description: Every model includes organization FK, critical rule comment in docstrings emphasizing organization_id filtering requirement
patterns_discovered.frequency: Consistent across MediaFolder and Media models

patterns_discovered.description: Inherits from SoftDeleteMixin, uses deleted_at timestamp, explicit soft_delete() method, get_queryset filters deleted_at__isnull=True
Custom display methods return formatted_html with color-coded badges, thumbnail previews, human-readable formatting
patterns_discovered.frequency: 13+ custom display methods in MediaAdmin alone

patterns_discovered.description: Self-referential parent FK on MediaFolder enables nested folder structures with helper methods like get_children, get_descendants, get_path
Media model includes is_image, is_video, is_document, is_audio boolean properties derived from media_type field
MediaFolder includes slug field with prepopulated_fields configuration in admin
Fieldsets organized by logical groups (File Information, Preview, URLs, Dimensions & Size, SEO & Accessibility) with collapsible sections

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Soft delete enforcement is critical but not enforced at database level
gotchas_discovered.description: Models implement soft delete via deleted_at timestamp and SoftDeleteMixin, but direct delete() calls are still possible. Docstring warns against this, but it's not enforced.
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential for accidental hard deletes if not careful
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Code review and documentation emphasize using soft_delete() method

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Organization filtering is not enforced in the ORM
gotchas_discovered.description: Multi-tenant isolation relies on explicit organization_id filtering in queries. There's no database-level constraint or custom manager to prevent cross-tenant queries.
gotchas_discovered.impact: Risk of data leakage if organization filter is accidentally omitted
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Critical rule documented in model docstring, but runtime error would only occur at business logic layer

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Slug uniqueness is scoped to parent folder
gotchas_discovered.description: Slug is intended to be unique within parent folder, but this is documented in docstring rather than enforced by model constraints
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential for accidental slug duplicates if validation is not implemented
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Docstring documents the requirement, admin configuration includes prepopulated_fields

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Admin preview methods depend on thumbnail_url or url existence
gotchas_discovered.description: thumbnail_preview methods check for thumbnail_url then url, but gracefully handle None by displaying 'No preview'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Media without URLs will show 'No preview' in admin list view
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Fallback text message handles missing URLs gracefully

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: File size formatting depends on external human_readable_size method
gotchas_discovered.description: Admin uses obj.human_readable_size but implementation appears to be in the truncated model definition
gotchas_discovered.impact: If human_readable_size is not implemented, admin will raise AttributeError
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Method implementation exists in full model (not shown in truncated diff)

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created a comprehensive media Django app with well-structured models, extensive admin interface, and proper multi-tenant isolation patterns
key_accomplishments: Implemented MediaFolder model with hierarchical structure and nested folder support
Implemented Media model with comprehensive file metadata and storage management
Created 3 TextChoices enums for type-safe field values
Built rich admin interface with 228 lines including custom displays, badges, and previews
Established multi-tenant isolation pattern using organization FK on all models
Implemented soft delete pattern across both primary models
Registered app in Django settings for proper initialization
code_quality_indicators: Well-organized fieldsets in admin with logical grouping
Query optimization with select_related in admin
Graceful fallbacks in display methods (no preview handling)
Critical rules documented prominently in code comments
approach_outcome.completeness: Full - all requested models created with choices and admin configuration

recommendations.recommendation: Add custom QuerySet/Manager to enforce organization filtering
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation relies on explicit filtering in views. A custom manager could prevent accidental cross-tenant queries.

recommendations.recommendation: Implement database-level constraints for soft delete pattern
recommendations.rationale: Consider adding CHECK constraints or custom save() override to prevent delete() method usage

recommendations.recommendation: Add UniqueConstraint for slug within parent folder scope
recommendations.rationale: Currently only documented in docstring. Enforce at database level using UniqueConstraint with Q objects

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite for multi-tenant isolation
recommendations.rationale: Given the critical nature of organization_id filtering, thorough tests are essential

recommendations.recommendation: Create migration guide for teams using this app
recommendations.rationale: App has specific patterns (soft delete, organization filtering) that developers need to understand

recommendations.recommendation: Add indexes for common query patterns (organization_id, media_type, status)
recommendations.rationale: Media queries will frequently filter by organization and media_type; indexes would improve performance

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding inline Media editing in MediaFolder admin
recommendations.rationale: Would improve workflow for managing media items within folders
